name: ac_seed_10_197_double_corner
notes: advanced-circuit @ rate=5 from ores. 3x3 zone at seed (10,197). Two orthogonal trunks cross at (10,197): copper-cable running south (trunk) and electronic-circuit running east (tap). At the NE corner (11,196), a copper-cable side-tap leaves east — corner turn with BOTH South IN (from above) and East OUT (to the right). Expected to solve after the corner-turn encoding fix (commit on ec_seed_18_104_corner_turn). If it's still UNSAT, the fix doesn't cover this shape and we need to dig in.
